description: Product description Get ready for some stretchy, squishy, mischievous fun with this Stretchy Grinch Toy! This grumpy green guy may try and steal Christmas, but he’ll definitely steal the show! Pull, twist and stretch him in every direction- he always snaps right back into shape. Ages 3+ Directions Pull and stretch the Grinch's arms and legs in various directions. Enjoy playing with him and your friends. Safety Warning Suitable for ages 3+ Choking Hazard See more
